mapper.select: SELECT wq.*, u.username as userName, u.phone, p.name as petName, p.cover as petAvatar FROM warning_questionnaire wq LEFT JOIN user u ON wq.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pet p ON wq.pet_id = p.id WHERE wq.id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, pet_id, question_type, questions, answers, score, warning_level, status, create_time, deadline, submit_time FROM warning_questionnaire WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT wq.*, p.name as petName, p.cover as petAvatar FROM warning_questionnaire wq LEFT JOIN pet p ON wq.pet_id = p.id WHERE wq.user_id = #{userId} AND wq.status = 1 AND wq.deadline > NOW() ORDER BY wq.deadline ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalQuestionnaires, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN warning_level > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as riskCount, AVG(score) as avgScore FROM warning_questionnaire
SELECT warning_level as level, COUNT(*) as count FROM warning_questionnaire WHERE warning_level > 0 GROUP BY warning_level

SELECT u.id as userId, u.username as userName, p.id as petId, p.name as petName, 0 as warningLevel, pao.create_time as adoptTime FROM pet_adopt_order pao INNER JOIN user u ON pao.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN pet p ON pao.pet_id = p.id WHERE pao.status = 4 ORDER BY pao.create_time DESC
